semantic.role: Defines the core application module container for the repository indexing pipeline.
responsibilities: Groups source files implementing the repository indexing pipeline
invariants: All source files must reside under the 'src' directory
Each child entry must have a valid filePath and fileKind
Provenance metadata must include indexedAt timestamp and generatorVersion

English.role: Defines the core application module container for the repository indexing pipeline.

parameter_definitions.schemaVersion: Version identifier for the configuration schema format.
parameter_definitions.directory: Root directory path where source files are located.
parameter_definitions.role: Functional description of this configuration block.
parameter_definitions.responsibility: High-level responsibility statement for the module group.
parameter_definitions.children: Array of source file entries, each with filePath, role, and fileKind.
parameter_definitions.provenance: Metadata block recording indexing timestamp, generator version, and pipeline stages used.

English.stability_and_risks: This configuration defines the structural layout of the core application. Misconfiguration of the directory path or missing children entries could break the indexing pipeline. The provenance metadata is critical for audit trails and reproducibility; missing or incorrect timestamps may cause versioning conflicts. The pipelineStages field must match the actual processing stages to avoid data integrity issues.

Simplified Chinese.role: 定义核心应用程序模块容器，用于仓库索引管道。

parameter_definitions.schemaVersion: 配置模式格式的版本标识符。
parameter_definitions.directory: 源文件所在的根目录路径。
parameter_definitions.responsibility: 模块组的高级职责说明。
parameter_definitions.children: 源文件条目数组，每个条目包含文件路径、角色和文件类型。
parameter_definitions.provenance: 记录索引时间戳、生成器版本和所用管道阶段的元数据块。

Simplified Chinese.stability_and_risks: 此配置定义了核心应用程序的结构布局。目录路径配置错误或缺少子条目可能导致索引管道中断。溯源元数据对于审计追踪和可重现性至关重要；时间戳缺失或不正确可能引发版本冲突。pipelineStages字段必须与实际处理阶段匹配，否则可能导致数据完整性问题。
